rulebook_urls.label: The Princess & the Dragon Rulebook (Z-Man Games)

chunks.title: The Princess & the Dragon — Setup Changes
chunks.content:
## New Components

| Component | Qty | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| New land tiles | 30 | Contain Volcano, Dragon movement, Magic Portal, and Princess symbols — shuffle into tile stack |
| Dragon figure (wooden) | 1 | Shared board element; starts **off the board** |
| Fairy figure (wooden) | 1 | Shared board element; starts **off the board** |

## Figure Placement at Game Start

- **Dragon:** Place off the board. It enters the board the first time a Volcano tile is drawn and placed.
- **Fairy:** Place off the board. Any player may move it (instead of placing a follower) to a tile containing one of their own followers.

Neither the Dragon nor the Fairy belongs to any single player — both are shared board elements.

chunks.title: Princess & Dragon — Special Tiles
chunks.content:
## Special Tile Types

| Tile | Placement Rule | Special Effect |
|---|---|---|
| **Volcano** | No follower may be placed on it | Dragon moves to this tile immediately; if Dragon was off-board, it enters here |
| **Dragon** | Normal follower placement applies first | After placement, Dragon moves 6 steps (see Dragon figure below) |
| **Magic Portal** | Normal tile placement | Instead of placing your follower on the just-placed tile, you may deploy to **any** tile already on the board (standard occupation rules apply — no occupied or completed features) |
| **Princess** | Must connect to an existing city | If that city has ≥1 Knight: placing player **must** remove exactly 1 Knight (any player's, placer's choice). No Knights in city = no effect. |

chunks.title: Princess & Dragon — Shared Figures
chunks.content:
## Dragon Figure

| Property | Rule |
|---|---|
| Enters board | On first Volcano tile drawn; moves to that tile |
| Movement trigger | Drawing a Dragon-symbol tile |
| Steps per activation | **6 total**, distributed among players in clockwise order from the placing player (1 step each) |
| Movement constraint | Orthogonally adjacent tiles only; cannot revisit a tile in the same sequence |
| Blocked tile | Cannot enter the tile occupied by the Fairy |
| Effect | All followers on an entered tile are removed and returned to owners (Fairy is unaffected); can eat normal followers, large followers, builder, pig, mayor, wagon |

## Fairy Figure

| Property | Rule |
|---|---|
| How to deploy | **Instead of** placing a follower in Step 2, move the Fairy to any tile containing one of your own followers |
| Dragon protection | Dragon cannot enter the Fairy's current tile |
| Turn-start bonus | At the **start of your turn**, if the Fairy is on a tile with your follower: score **+1 pt** immediately |
| Feature completion bonus | When the feature containing the Fairy's tile is completed and scored, the follower owner on that tile gains **+3 bonus pts** |

chunks.title: Princess & the Dragon — Modified Turn Sequence
chunks.content:
## Turn Sequence

### Before Your Turn
- If the **Fairy** is on a tile with **your follower**, score **+1 pt** immediately before drawing.

### Step 1 — Draw & Place Tile
- **Volcano tile:** Dragon immediately moves to that tile. You **cannot** place a follower this turn (skip Step 2).
- **Princess tile:** If the tile connects to a city containing knights, **one knight must be removed** before anything else proceeds.
- All other tiles: normal placement rules.

### Step 2 — Follower or Fairy Move (skip if Volcano placed)

| Option | Rule |
|---|---|
| Place a follower | Standard rule — on just-placed tile |
| Move the Fairy | To any tile where you currently have a follower |
| Magic Portal bonus | If you placed a Magic Portal tile, your follower may go on **any already-placed tile** on the board |

### Step 2.5 — Dragon Movement (Dragon-symbol tile only)

| Detail | Rule |
|---|---|
| Who moves | Starting with you, then clockwise — each player moves Dragon **1 step** |
| Total steps | **6 steps** per activation |
| Movement | Orthogonal only; no revisiting in this sequence; cannot enter Fairy's tile |
| Effect | **Eats all followers** on every tile entered |

### Step 3 — Score Completed Features
- Normal scoring applies.

### Quick Reference Table

| Situation | Effect |
|---|---|
| Fairy on your follower at turn start | +1 pt before drawing |
| Volcano tile placed | Dragon teleports there; skip Step 2 |
| Princess tile connects to city with knights | Remove 1 knight immediately |
| Magic Portal tile placed | Follower in Step 2 may go on ANY existing tile |
| Dragon-symbol tile placed | Dragon moves 6 steps after Step 2 |

chunks.title: Princess & the Dragon — Fairy Scoring Bonuses
chunks.content:
## Fairy Scoring Bonuses

All other scoring (roads, cities, monasteries, farms) is unchanged. Dragon, Volcano, Magic Portal, and Princess tiles do not award points — they modify board state.

| Trigger | Condition | Points |
|---|---|---|
| Start-of-turn bonus | Fairy occupies the same tile as one of **your** followers at the start of your turn | **+1 pt** (before drawing) |
| Feature completion bonus | A feature is completed that includes the Fairy's tile and you have a follower on that tile | **+3 pts** (added to normal feature score) |

**Key notes:**
- Only the player whose follower shares the Fairy's tile benefits.
- Both bonuses can apply to the same player in the same turn if conditions are met.
